content.en:
"Hypnotic talent!"

Ye Tian tried to use his hypnotic talent to hypnotize Ling Wu, but found that he couldn't hypnotize him at all.

"Sure enough!"

Ye Tian is clear.

Before he used his hypnotic talent, he felt that the hypnotic talent might not be able to hypnotize Ling Wu, after all, the level of hypnotic talent was too low, and Ling Wu was the son of the era, and his soul was very powerful, unlike the creatures of this universe who were very poor in soul achievement.

Coupled with the fact that Ling Wu had a powerful soul defense treasure to protect his soul, it was almost difficult to hypnotize him with his hypnotic talent.

Of course, this didn't mean that Ye Tian couldn't hypnotize Ling Wu.

Immediately, Ye Tian attacked Ling Wu again, attacking him again and again, almost beating him to a near-death state.

Subsequently, Ye Tian used the soul attack secret technique to bombard Ling Wu's soul again and again, finally breaking the opponent's soul defense, and then using the hypnotic talent to invade the depths of the opponent's soul and completely manipulate the opponent's soul.

Ye Tian began to interrogate.

"Tell me, how did you creatures of the twelve cosmic epochs survive to the present cosmic era, and how did you avoid the cosmic apocalypse?"

Ye Tian asked.

Ling Wu was hypnotized and said truthfully, "I don't know either!"

"What, you don't know?" Ye Tian was stunned, in his opinion, Ling Wu had survived the Great Destruction of the Universe, how could he not know the reason.

Under Ye Tian's repeated questioning, he gradually understood some of the situation.

It turned out that Ling Wu really didn't know how he survived.

In Ling Wu's memory, he was born in an era that was still far away from the Great Destruction of the Universe, and was sealed by the elders of the clan when he was at the level of the Galaxy, until the Great Destruction of the Universe came.

When the universe was about to collapse, he woke up.

Later, he and some of the other children of the era entered a gate of light, and then his consciousness was shattered, and he did not see the sight of the great destruction of the universe.

When I woke up again, I appeared in the world of ruins.

Moreover, when he appeared, it was not his current cultivation, but an infant state, and he slowly grew to this level.

To put it simply, he had already woken up, but he had only recovered his physical body and cultivation in the ruins world, and those Supremes were also infantile at the beginning, and slowly returned to the current supreme realm.

As for why he was able to avoid the Great Destruction of the Universe, Ling Wu also asked the Supremes, but he was warned by the Supremes that he was not allowed to ask about this matter in the future, unless he broke through to the Supreme Realm, he would be qualified for this matter.

"Unexpectedly, these sons of the era don't know the truth, no wonder those supremes of the twelve universe epochs dare to let these ten sons of the era in, because they have no fear, even if there is an accident, they can't reveal their secrets!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he didn't gain nothing.

From Ling Wu's mouth, he learned that these sons of the era and the supreme did die in the great destruction of the universe, but they were only revived in this era of the universe.

It's a bit like reincarnation!

"That's right, it's like reincarnation, reincarnation, but these people are like autonomous reincarnation, and they can choose to reincarnate in these ruins. But if the universe is destroyed, the reincarnation channel will also be closed, how can it be possible to reincarnate in the next cosmic era? The Supreme has such a great ability? No, if it can be done, Kunwu Supreme They will not know. Moreover, the supreme of the Six Dao Reincarnation Temple in the last era was so desperate, it can be seen that even those supremes of the twelve cosmic epochs, only a very small number of supremes have survived to this cosmic era, and the vast majority of supremes have not lived at all, they are really dead!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After that, Ye Tian asked many more things, but Ling Wu really didn't know much.

"No matter how much you ask, it's useless, this son of the era doesn't know the secret of the core at all, the universe has built all worlds, and has paid a lot of galaxy-level lives, if you just ask this person a little information, it will naturally be a loss, it seems that you can only carry out the second plan!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The second plan is a backup plan, which is a plan that will be implemented only after a major gain has not been made.

This plan is somewhat risky, and it is easy to offend the great powers of the twelve cosmic eras.

However, for the purpose of the great forces of the twelve cosmic epochs and how to avoid the secret of the great destruction of the universe, all the races of the universe must take a risk.

Even Ye Tian wanted to know how to avoid the Great Collapse of the Universe, after all, he was sure of detachment, but what about his wife, sister and others, they couldn't escape.

Ye Tian didn't want to be alone and detached, he also wanted to take others to detach together.

So, it would be great if that secret could really make people dodge the apocalypse!

And the second plan is to capture more children of the era, and then contact the outside world, and exchange the lives of these children of the era for secrets.

Of course, this plan is to do what you can, if Ye Tian's strength is not enough, he will not be able to capture more sons of the era.

The other universe clans only used this plan as a backup, but they didn't know Ye Tian's true strength and the true strength of those sons of the era.

Therefore, it is difficult to guarantee the success of this plan.

"Go capture the children of the other eras!"

Ye Tian began to act.

Time passed little by little, and three days later, Ye Tian found a son of the era again, the other party was a little stronger than Ling Wu, but he was still easily caught by Ye Tian.

As time passed, one by one the sons of the era were captured by Ye Tian, and they couldn't escape at all.

Eventually, there is only one Child of the Epoch left.

From the mouth of the son of other eras, I learned that this son of the era is named Aurora, and he is a son of the era of the fourth universe era, and his combat power is very perverted, he is the son of the era at the peak level, and his combat power is not comparable to that of the children of other eras, and the speed is extremely fast, and he has mastered a speed secret art that surpasses the limit.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found this Aurora!

On a certain river, Ye Tian and Aurora met.

As soon as they met, the two began to fight.

Bang!!!!

The aftermath of the terrifying battle shook the sky, and hundreds of millions of miles of rivers instantly turned into nothingness.

War!

War!

War!

Although Ye Tian did not do his best, he also showed most of his combat strength, but he did not show a crushing posture.

It is clear that the combat effectiveness of the Aurora is not weak.

"How is that possible?"

Aurora was very surprised by Ye Tian's combat strength.

"Ye Tian was just born in an ordinary cosmic clan, and this cosmic epoch is only in the early and middle stages, not even the late stage, many inheritances are very weak, and even only inherited a small part of the inheritances of other cosmic epochs, and have not walked out of their own path at all, how can such a cosmic epoch era give birth to such a son of the anti-heaven era?"

Aurora was puzzled.

It stands to reason that a son of the era like Ye Tian should be a son of the anti-heaven-level era who fought out of countless geniuses in the prosperous cultivation era at the end of the universe.

"No matter how strong you are, the final victory will definitely be mine!"

Aurora roared.

Suddenly, the battle between the two was in a white-hot state!
